mapper.insert: /* saveWphyList */ insert into WPHYIT ( COMPKEY , PHYSOKY , PHYSOIT , WAREKEY , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , SUOMKEY , PHYNAME , PHYMODE , STOCKKY , AREAKEY , ZONEKEY , LOCAKEY , LOTNMKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , SYSTQTY , PHYSQTY , COMPQTY , STKSTAT , BLOCKID , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER , INDIBZL , INDIARC , UPDTCHK ) values ( #{userData.compkey} , #{physoky} , fn_wm_physoit( #{userData.compkey}, #{physoky} ), #{warekey} , #{doccate} , #{doctype} , #{suomkey} , #{phyname} , #{phymode} , #{stockky} , #{areakey} , #{zonekey} , #{locakey} , #{lotnmky} , #{ownerky} , #{skumkey} , #{skudesc} , #{stotqty} , #{physqty} , #{compqty} , #{stkstat} , #{blockid} , to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} , to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} , #{indibzl} , #{indiarc} , #{updtchk} )
mapper.select: /* selectAdjsoky */ select fn_wm_adjsoky() from dual
/* selectAdjgrky */ select fn_wm_adjgrky() from dual

/* updateWmi22ToWstkkyList */ CALL sp_wm_ctrstokky_adj(#{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}, #{doccate}, #{doctype} , #{adjsoky} , #{adjsoit} , #{adjgrky} , #{userData.useract} , #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
select fn_wm_adjsoky() from dual
select fn_wm_adjgrky() from dual

select concat(A.COMPKEY , A.STOCKKY) as rowkey , A.COMPKEY as compkey , ' ' as adjsoky , A.WAREKEY as warekey , 'BEFORE' as adjmode , ' ' as adjgrky , ' ' as rsncode , ' ' as adjsrmk , A.STOCKKY as stockky , A.AREAKEY as areakey , A.ZONEKEY as zonekey , A.LOCAKEY as locakey , A.SUBSECT as subsect , A.TRUNTYP as truntyp , A.TRUNPID as trunpid , A.LOTNMKY as lotnmky , A.OWNERKY as ownerky , A.SKUMKEY as skumkey , C.SKUDESC as skudesc , C.SKUGR02 as skugr02 , C.SKUGR03 as skugr03 , C.SKUGR04 as skugr04 , C.SKUGR05 as skugr05 , A.VENDKEY as vendkey , A.SIRBCOD as sirbcod , A.STOTQTY as stotqty , A.SALLQTY as sallqty , A.SINBQTY as sinbqty , A.SOUBQTY as soubqty , A.SBLOQTY as sbloqty , 0 as scbloqty , A.SUOMKEY as suomkey , date_format(A.PRODDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as proddat , A.SHELIFE as shelife , date_format(A.EXPIDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as expidat , date_format(A.RCVDCDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvdcdt , date_format(A.RCVFRDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvfrdt , A.LOTFRKY as lotfrky , A.LOTAT01 as lotat01 , A.LOTAT02 as lotat02 , A.LOTAT03 as lotat03 , A.LOTAT04 as lotat04 , A.LOTAT05 as lotat05 , A.LOTAT06 as lotat06 , A.LOTAT07 as lotat07 , A.LOTAT08 as lotat08 , A.LOTAT09 as lotat09 , A.LOTAT10 as lotat10 , A.LOTAT11 as lotat11 , A.LOTAT12 as lotat12 , A.LOTAT13 as lotat13 , A.LOTAT14 as lotat14 , A.LOTAT15 as lotat15 , A.LOTAT16 as lotat16 , A.LOTAT17 as lotat17 , A.LOTAT18 as lotat18 , A.LOTAT19 as lotat19 , A.LOTAT20 as lotat20 , A.STKSTAT as stkstat , A.BLOCKID as blockid , A.PHYSROW as physrow , A.PHYSSEC as physsec , A.PHYSFLO as physflo , A.RCVDCKY as rcvdcky , A.RCVDCIT as rcvdcit , A.TASKOKY as taskoky , A.TASKOIT as taskoit , A.SHPDCKY as shpdcky , A.SHPDCIT as shpdcit , A.PHYSOKY as physoky , A.PHYSOIT as physoit , A.STORFKY as storfky , date_format(A.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as credate , date_format(A.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as cretime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.CREUSER) as creuser , date_format(A.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as lmodate , date_format(A.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as lmotime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.LMOUSER) as lmouser , ' ' as indibzl , ' ' as indiarc , 0 as updtchk from WSTKKY A inner join MOWRMA B on A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY inner join MSKUWC C on A.COMPKEY = C.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = C.WAREKEY and A.OWNERKY = C.OWNERKY and A.SKUMKEY = C.SKUMKEY inner join MWARMA D on A.COMPKEY = D.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = D.WAREKEY where 1=1 and A.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and A.STOTQTY != 0 and A.SALLQTY = 0 and A.SINBQTY = 0 and A.SOUBQTY = 0 and A.AREAKEY = 'STG' and A.STOCKKY = #{stockky} and A.SKUMKEY like concat( '%' , #{skumkey} , '%')

select concat(A.COMPKEY , A.STOCKKY) as rowkey , A.COMPKEY as compkey , ' ' as adjsoky , A.WAREKEY as warekey , 'BEFORE' as adjmode , ' ' as adjgrky , ' ' as rsncode , ' ' as adjsrmk , A.STOCKKY as stockky , A.AREAKEY as areakey , A.ZONEKEY as zonekey , A.LOCAKEY as locakey , A.SUBSECT as subsect , A.TRUNTYP as truntyp , A.TRUNPID as trunpid , A.LOTNMKY as lotnmky , A.OWNERKY as ownerky , A.SKUMKEY as skumkey , C.SKUDESC as skudesc , C.SKUGR02 as skugr02 , C.SKUGR03 as skugr03 , C.SKUGR04 as skugr04 , C.SKUGR05 as skugr05 , A.VENDKEY as vendkey , A.SIRBCOD as sirbcod , A.STOTQTY as stotqty , A.SALLQTY as sallqty , A.SINBQTY as sinbqty , A.SOUBQTY as soubqty , A.SBLOQTY as sbloqty , 0 as scbloqty , A.SUOMKEY as suomkey , date_format(A.PRODDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as proddat , A.SHELIFE as shelife , date_format(A.EXPIDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as expidat , date_format(A.RCVDCDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvdcdt , date_format(A.RCVFRDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvfrdt , A.LOTFRKY as lotfrky , A.LOTAT01 as lotat01 , A.LOTAT02 as lotat02 , A.LOTAT03 as lotat03 , A.LOTAT04 as lotat04 , A.LOTAT05 as lotat05 , A.LOTAT06 as lotat06 , A.LOTAT07 as lotat07 , A.LOTAT08 as lotat08 , A.LOTAT09 as lotat09 , A.LOTAT10 as lotat10 , A.LOTAT11 as lotat11 , A.LOTAT12 as lotat12 , A.LOTAT13 as lotat13 , A.LOTAT14 as lotat14 , A.LOTAT15 as lotat15 , A.LOTAT16 as lotat16 , A.LOTAT17 as lotat17 , A.LOTAT18 as lotat18 , A.LOTAT19 as lotat19 , A.LOTAT20 as lotat20 , A.STKSTAT as stkstat , A.BLOCKID as blockid , A.PHYSROW as physrow , A.PHYSSEC as physsec , A.PHYSFLO as physflo , A.RCVDCKY as rcvdcky , A.RCVDCIT as rcvdcit , A.TASKOKY as taskoky , A.TASKOIT as taskoit , A.SHPDCKY as shpdcky , A.SHPDCIT as shpdcit , A.PHYSOKY as physoky , A.PHYSOIT as physoit , A.STORFKY as storfky , date_format(A.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as credate , date_format(A.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as cretime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.CREUSER) as creuser , date_format(A.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as lmodate , date_format(A.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as lmotime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.LMOUSER) as lmouser , ' ' as indibzl , ' ' as indiarc , 0 as updtchk from WSTKKY A inner join MOWRMA B on A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY inner join MSKUWC C on A.COMPKEY = C.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = C.WAREKEY and A.OWNERKY = C.OWNERKY and A.SKUMKEY = C.SKUMKEY inner join MWARMA D on A.COMPKEY = D.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = D.WAREKEY left outer join SUSRMA U on U.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and U.USERACT = C.SKUAT01 where 1=1 and A.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and A.STOTQTY != 0 and A.SALLQTY = 0 and A.SINBQTY = 0 and A.SOUBQTY = 0 and A.SBLOQTY != 0 and A.AREAKEY = 'STG' and A.STOCKKY = #{stockky}

select concat(A.COMPKEY , A.STOCKKY) as rowkey , A.COMPKEY as compkey , ' ' as adjsoky , A.WAREKEY as warekey , 'BEFORE' as adjmode , ' ' as adjgrky , ' ' as rsncode , ' ' as adjsrmk , A.STOCKKY as stockky , A.AREAKEY as areakey , A.ZONEKEY as zonekey , A.LOCAKEY as locakey , A.VENDKEY as vendkey , A.SUBSECT as subsect , A.TRUNTYP as truntyp , A.TRUNPID as trunpid , A.LOTNMKY as lotnmky , A.OWNERKY as ownerky , A.SKUMKEY as skumkey , C.SKUDESC as skudesc , A.SIRBCOD as sirbcod , A.STOTQTY as stotqty , A.SALLQTY as sallqty , A.SINBQTY as sinbqty , A.SOUBQTY as soubqty , A.SBLOQTY as sbloqty , 0 as schnqty , A.SUOMKEY as suomkey , date_format(A.RCVDCDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvdcdt , date_format(A.RCVFRDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvfrdt , A.LOTAT01 as lotat01 , A.LOTAT02 as lotat02 , A.LOTAT03 as lotat03 , A.LOTAT04 as lotat04 , A.LOTAT05 as lotat05 , A.LOTAT06 as lotat06 , A.LOTAT07 as lotat07 , A.LOTAT08 as lotat08 , A.LOTAT09 as lotat09 , A.LOTAT10 as lotat10 , A.LOTAT11 as lotat11 , A.LOTAT12 as lotat12 , A.LOTAT13 as lotat13 , A.LOTAT14 as lotat14 , A.LOTAT15 as lotat15 , A.LOTAT16 as lotat16 , A.LOTAT17 as lotat17 , A.LOTAT18 as lotat18 , A.LOTAT19 as lotat19 , A.LOTAT20 as lotat20 , A.LOTFRKY as lotfrky , A.STKSTAT as stkstat , A.BLOCKID as blockid , A.PHYSROW as physrow , A.PHYSSEC as physsec , A.PHYSFLO as physflo , A.RCVDCKY as rcvdcky , A.RCVDCIT as rcvdcit , A.TASKOKY as taskoky , A.TASKOIT as taskoit , A.SHPDCKY as shpdcky , A.SHPDCIT as shpdcit , A.PHYSOKY as physoky , A.PHYSOIT as physoit , A.STORFKY as storfky , date_format(A.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as credate , date_format(A.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as cretime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.CREUSER) as creuser , date_format(A.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as lmodate , date_format(A.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as lmotime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.LMOUSER) as lmouser , ' ' as indibzl , ' ' as indiarc , 0 as updtchk from WSTKKY A inner join MOWRMA B on A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY inner join MSKUWC C on A.COMPKEY = C.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = C.WAREKEY and A.OWNERKY = C.OWNERKY and A.SKUMKEY = C.SKUMKEY inner join MWARMA D on A.COMPKEY = D.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = D.WAREKEY left outer join SUSRMA U on U.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and U.USERACT = C.SKUAT01
and A.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and A.SALLQTY = 0 and A.SINBQTY = 0 and A.SOUBQTY = 0 and A.AREAKEY = 'STG' and A.STOCKKY = #{stockky}

{ CALL sp_wm_ctrstokky_adj(#{compkey}, #{warekey}, #{doccate}, #{doctype} , #{adjsoky} , #{adjsoit} , #{adjgrky} , #{lmouser} , #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) }

select concat(A.COMPKEY , A.STOCKKY) as rowkey , A.COMPKEY , A.WAREKEY , ( select WHNAMLC from MWARMA M where M.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and M.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY ) as whnamlc , ( select OWNAMLC from MOWRMA M where M.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and M.OWNERKY = A.OWNERKY ) as ownamlc , A.STOCKKY , A.AREAKEY , ( select AREANAM from MAREMA M where M.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and M.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY and M.AREAKEY = A.AREAKEY ) as areanam , A.ZONEKEY , ( select ZONENAM from MZONMA M where M.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and M.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY and M.AREAKEY = A.AREAKEY and M.ZONEKEY = A.ZONEKEY ) as zonenam , A.LOCAKEY , ( select LOCANAM from MLOCMA M where M.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and M.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY and M.AREAKEY = A.AREAKEY and M.ZONEKEY = A.ZONEKEY and M.LOCAKEY = A.LOCAKEY ) as locanam , 'BEFORE' as adjmode , A.SUBSECT , A.TRUNTYP , A.TRUNPID , A.LOTNMKY , A.OWNERKY , A.SKUMKEY , C.SKUDESC , C.SKUGR02 , C.SKUGR03 , C.SKUGR04 , C.SKUGR05 , C.SKUAT01 , A.VENDKEY , A.SIRBCOD , A.STOTQTY , A.SALLQTY , 0 as schnqty , A.SINBQTY , A.SOUBQTY , A.SBLOQTY , A.SUOMKEY , fn_com_todate(A.PRODDAT) as proddat , A.SHELIFE , fn_com_todate(A.EXPIDAT) as expidat , fn_com_todate(A.RCVDCDT) as rcvdcdt , fn_com_todate(A.RCVFRDT) as rcvfrdt , A.LOTFRKY , A.LOTAT01 , A.LOTAT02 , A.LOTAT03 , A.LOTAT04 , A.LOTAT05 , A.LOTAT06 , A.LOTAT07 , A.LOTAT08 , A.LOTAT09 , A.LOTAT10 , A.LOTAT11 , A.LOTAT12 , A.LOTAT13 , A.LOTAT14 , A.LOTAT15 , A.LOTAT16 , A.LOTAT17 , A.LOTAT18 , A.LOTAT19 , A.LOTAT20 , A.STKSTAT , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM M where M.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY and M.COMCDKY = 'STKSTAT' and M.COMCDVL = A.STKSTAT) as STATNAM , A.BLOCKID , A.PHYSROW , A.PHYSSEC , A.PHYSFLO , A.RCVDCKY , A.RCVDCIT , A.TASKOKY , A.TASKOIT , A.SHPDCKY , A.SHPDCIT , A.PHYSOKY , A.PHYSOIT , A.STORFKY , fn_com_todate(A.CREDATE) as credate , fn_com_totime(A.CRETIME) as cretime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.CREUSER) as creuser , fn_com_todate(A.LMODATE) as lmodate , fn_com_totime(A.LMOTIME) as lmotime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.LMOUSER) as lmouser , A.INDIBZL , A.INDIARC , A.UPDTCHK from WSTKKY A inner join MOWRMA B on A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY inner join MSKUWC C on A.COMPKEY = C.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = C.WAREKEY and A.OWNERKY = C.OWNERKY and A.SKUMKEY = C.SKUMKEY inner join MWARMA D on A.COMPKEY = D.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = D.WAREKEY
A.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and A.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and A.STOTQTY != 0 and A.SALLQTY = 0 and A.SINBQTY = 0 and A.SOUBQTY = 0 and A.AREAKEY = 'STG'
and A.OWNERKY = #{ownerky}
and A.LOCAKEY like concat( '%' , #{locakey} , '%')
and A.SKUMKEY like concat( '%' , #{skumkey} , '%')
and C.SKUDESC like concat( '%' , #{skudesc} , '%')
ㅈ and A.STKSTAT = #{stkstat}

select concat(A.COMPKEY , A.STOCKKY) as rowkey , A.COMPKEY , ' ' as adjsoky , A.WAREKEY , ( select WHNAMLC from MWARMA M where M.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY AND M.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY ) as whnamlc , 'BEFORE' , ' ' as adjgrky , ' ' as rsncode , ' ' as adjsrmk , A.STOCKKY , A.AREAKEY , A.ZONEKEY , A.LOCAKEY , A.SUBSECT , A.TRUNTYP , A.TRUNPID , A.LOTNMKY , A.OWNERKY , A.SKUMKEY , C.SKUDESC , C.SKUGR02 , C.SKUGR03 , C.SKUGR04 , C.SKUGR05 , A.VENDKEY , A.SIRBCOD , A.STOTQTY , A.SALLQTY , A.SINBQTY , A.SOUBQTY , A.SBLOQTY , 0 as scbloqty , A.SUOMKEY , date_format(A.PRODDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as proddat , A.SHELIFE as shelife , date_format(A.EXPIDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as expidat , date_format(A.RCVDCDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvdcdt , date_format(A.RCVFRDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rcvfrdt , A.LOTFRKY , A.LOTAT01 , A.LOTAT02 , A.LOTAT03 , A.LOTAT04 , A.LOTAT05 , A.LOTAT06 , A.LOTAT07 , A.LOTAT08 , A.LOTAT09 , A.LOTAT10 , A.LOTAT11 , A.LOTAT12 , A.LOTAT13 , A.LOTAT14 , A.LOTAT15 , A.LOTAT16 , A.LOTAT17 , A.LOTAT18 , A.LOTAT19 , A.LOTAT20 , A.STKSTAT , A.BLOCKID , A.PHYSROW , A.PHYSSEC , A.PHYSFLO , A.RCVDCKY , A.RCVDCIT , A.TASKOKY , A.TASKOIT , A.SHPDCKY , A.SHPDCIT , A.PHYSOKY , A.PHYSOIT , A.STORFKY , date_format(A.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as credate , date_format(A.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as cretime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.CREUSER) as creuser , date_format(A.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as lmodate , date_format(A.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as lmotime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.LMOUSER) as lmouser , A.INDIBZL , A.INDIARC , A.UPDTCHK from WSTKKY A inner join MOWRMA B on A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY inner join MSKUWC C on A.COMPKEY = C.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = C.WAREKEY and A.OWNERKY = C.OWNERKY and A.SKUMKEY = C.SKUMKEY inner join MWARMA D on A.COMPKEY = D.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = D.WAREKEY
A.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and A.SALLQTY = 0 and A.SINBQTY = 0 and A.SOUBQTY = 0 and A.STOTQTY != 0 and A.SBLOQTY = 0 and A.AREAKEY = 'STG' and A.STOCKKY = #{stockky}
